microsoft_ft: Took **full ownership** of Azure's recovery validation program, scaling it from a 2-person operation into a platformized system that sustained 45+ annual resilience drills and drove **$14M+ business impact** across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and shifted execution to a scalable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability—delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation standard.

Directed 14 high-visibility cross-org recovery executions, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, coordinating stakeholders and documenting every decision.

Built an internal **AI agent** for drill planning and restructured workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21%, compressing timelines that would be unrealistic for most teams.
microsoft_2023: Championed **product adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, running user demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key teams and saved **37 engineering hours monthly**.

Influenced the roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by conducting 11+ user interviews with Azure service teams, identifying critical feature gaps and translating customer insight into actionable requirements.

Improved data retrieval and user experience by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% and delighting internal customers.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams.
Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to surface 81 hours of manual effort per region launch, then built a **product roadmap** to automate critical paths and eliminate operational toil at scale.
Engineered a Power BI dashboard tracking toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership **real-time visibility** into automation gaps and enabling data-driven prioritization of high-impact initiatives.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by owning the legacy OS migration strategy end-to-end and mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations with meticulous attention to detail.
Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process under compressed timelines.

Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated CI/CD pipelines, **accelerating deployment cycles by 25%** and improving the reliability of the customer-facing robotics experience.
pro_painters: Increased **job bookings by 26%** by optimizing end-to-end scoping and invoicing for 200+ monthly proposals through a redesigned CRM process that improved customer retention and repeat engagement.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by 13% and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a **digital-first go-to-market strategy**, optimizing the website and Google profile to acquire and retain customers.

Improved pricing models and sealed margin leaks by conducting profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, delivering actionable insights that directly shaped leadership's product and pricing decisions.
